_readme: eligibleAuthors must contain GitHub usernames (matching data/users.json), not display names. Only admins may edit eligibleAuthors (enforced by the GitHub Action in .github/workflows). A member can only add their own name to 'authors' on a paper where their GitHub username is already listed in that paper's eligibleAuthors.
